recommendations.title: Utilizing Big Data in Gyeongsangnam-do
recommendations.description: Big data analysis for solving regional issues and contributing to local development, as well as planning entrepreneurial ideas using public-private data and AI technology.

recommendations.description: Developing ideas for entrepreneurship, planning and analyzing data from food/pharmaceuticals/medical devices

recommendations.description: Develop creative ideas using public data and AI technology, or develop products/services based on such ideas. Analyze big data to solve Sejong city's current issues and improve existing policies.
